summary: Iteration 5 testing complete. All features working: (1) Duplicate recipe button appends '(copy)' to name and preserves ingredients/fixed_costs. (2) Bidirectional cost calculation working - unit→case AND case→unit. (3) All cost fields rounded to 1 decimal place. (4) Manage tab white space fixed (changed from 'overflow-auto max-h-[70vh]' to 'overflow-x-auto'). (5) Column sorting working with ▲/▼ indicators. 44/44 backend tests pass.
passed_tests: Bidirectional cost: PUT /api/items/{id} with cost_per_unit=42, cost_per_case=0, units_per_case=15 → returns cost_per_case=630
Bidirectional cost: PUT /api/items/{id} with cost_per_unit=0, cost_per_case=955, units_per_case=24 → returns cost_per_unit=39.8
Decimal rounding: PUT /api/items/{id} with cost_per_unit=39.791666 → returns cost_per_unit=39.8
Decimal rounding: All cost fields (cost_per_unit, cost_per_case, sale_price) always rounded to 1 decimal
Decimal rounding: Auto-calculated costs are also rounded (33.33 * 7 = 233.3, not 233.31)
Frontend rounding: Manage tab displays cost values with at most 1 decimal place (e.g., 50.1, 31.8, 27.1)
Manage tab white space: Container uses 'overflow-x-auto' without max-height restriction - no excessive white space
Column sorting: Click Name header shows '▲' ascending indicator, second click shows '▼' descending
Duplicate recipe: Click copy icon opens dialog with '(copy)' appended to recipe name
Duplicate recipe: Fixed costs (Ice ฿2) are preserved in duplicate
Duplicate recipe: Sale price (฿150) is preserved in duplicate
Recipe CRUD: Create, read, update, delete all working via API
Recipe with ingredients: Items can be added with servings_per_unit and servings_used for cost calculation
critical_code_review_comments: Backend bidirectional calculation in server.py lines 304-312: Uses condition 'cost_per_case == 0 and cost_per_unit > 0' for unit→case and 'cost_per_unit == 0 and cost_per_case > 0' for case→unit - correct logic
Backend always rounds all cost fields with round(value, 1) in lines 310-312
Frontend bidirectional calculation in App.js lines 395-403: Mirrors backend logic correctly
Frontend r1() helper at line 542 rounds display values: Math.round(v * 10) / 10
Frontend loadData() at lines 105-110 rounds costs on fetch for immediate clean display
Manage tab container changed from 'overflow-auto max-h-[70vh]' to 'overflow-x-auto' - removes max height restriction
duplicateRecipe function at lines 626-634: Creates copy without id (so POST creates new), appends '(copy)' to name, deep copies ingredients and fixed_costs arrays
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up: TEST_* items via pytest fixtures, 'Test Recipe for Duplication' recipe for duplicate test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 fixes verified working: (1) Duplicate recipe button with data-testid='duplicate-recipe-{id}' appends '(copy)' and preserves all data. (2) Bidirectional cost calculation in both backend (server.py:304-312) and frontend (App.js:395-403). (3) All cost fields rounded to 1 decimal in backend and frontend. (4) Manage tab container changed to 'overflow-x-auto' without max-height. 44 backend tests cover all CRUD operations, rounding, bidirectional calculation, recipes with ingredients.
